name: Loki Error-Log Alert
description: Scheduled error-log alert for the Aithericon cluster. A Cron trigger fires the workflow on a schedule (default every 15 minutes); the Start carries the dispatch `fire_time`. An AutomatedStep (backendType=loki) runs the LogQL query `{nomad_task=~".+"} |~ "(?i)(error|fatal|panic|exception)"` over a 15m lookback window against the cluster Loki resource `aithericon_loki` (http://loki.service.consul:3100), returning the matched log entries. An Agent (single-shot LLM) reads those entries and writes a concise human-readable incident summary. A second AutomatedStep (backendType=smtp) renders that summary into a subject + text + HTML email and sends it through the `mail` SMTP resource. End maps the send outcome and the matched entry count. The agent binds the in-cluster inference router via `provider: internal` + `resourceAlias: internal_pool_router` (model qwen3.5:9b), the same GDPR-safe internal-LLM pattern as demo 37 — inference never escapes off-router and the compiler emits the OpenAI-compatible wire shape. Requires: a `loki` resource named `aithericon_loki` (auto-seeded from demos/resources/aithericon_loki.json — override the endpoint with AITHERICON_LOKI_URL); an `internal_llm` resource `internal_pool_router` + `model_registry` `internal_pool_registry` (auto-seeded; the router endpoint comes from MEKHAN_ROUTER_URL); and an `smtp` resource named `mail` (auto-seeded from demos/resources/mail.json; pair with `just dev mailhog-up` to capture mail in dev). Replace `mail` with a real SMTP relay resource for production sends.
